title: OpenEBS LVM (SigNoz / ClickHouse)
description: OpenEBS LVM volume group, physical volumes and volumes (mocha).

query.rawSql: SELECT DISTINCT JSONExtractString(labels,'k8s.cluster.name') FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='lvm_vg_total_size_bytes' AND JSONExtractString(labels,'k8s.cluster.name')!='' ORDER BY 1

targets.rawSql: SELECT time, max(v) AS value FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, anyLast(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='lvm_vg_total_size_bytes' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='lvm_vg_total_size_bytes' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, cluster) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT time, max(v) AS value FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, anyLast(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='lvm_vg_free_size_bytes' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='lvm_vg_free_size_bytes' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, cluster) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT time, max(v) AS value FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, anyLast(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='lvm_vg_lv_count' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='lvm_vg_lv_count' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, cluster) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT time, max(v) AS value FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, anyLast(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='lvm_vg_pv_count' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='lvm_vg_pv_count' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, cluster) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT time, name, max(v) AS value FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'name') AS name, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, anyLast(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='lvm_vg_free_size_bytes' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='lvm_vg_free_size_bytes' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, name, cluster) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) GROUP BY time, name ORDER BY time

SELECT name, max(v) AS value FROM (SELECT s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'name') AS name, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, anyLast(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='lvm_pv_used_size_bytes' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='lvm_pv_used_size_bytes' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY fp, name, cluster) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) GROUP BY name ORDER BY value DESC

SELECT time, name, max(v) AS value FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'name') AS name, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, anyLast(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='lvm_pv_free_size_bytes' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='lvm_pv_free_size_bytes' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, name, cluster) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) GROUP BY time, name ORDER BY time

SELECT volumename, max(v) AS value FROM (SELECT s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'volumename') AS volumename, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, anyLast(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='openebs_size_of_volume' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='openebs_size_of_volume' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY fp, volumename, cluster) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) GROUP BY volumename ORDER BY value DESC
